markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review initial content performance and transition to Phase 2.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strong Early Results:** 9 articles generated 100k+ impressions and secured Page 1 Google rankings for high-intent keywords (e.g., "best VC for startup founders"), a rare outcome for a new content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
  - [**AI Visibility Wins:** Content is appearing in Google AI Overviews and is cited by Claude for CRV's specific value proposition ("excels with technical founders"), directly addressing the "who is CRV" problem.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)
  - [**New Point of Contact:** Erik O'Brien becomes the primary contact for Phase 2, which will focus on increasing publishing velocity to \~20 articles/month and optimizing strategy based on performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [**Rebrand Blocker:** A critical issue is that Google/AI tools are citing the old "Charles River Ventures" name. This must be resolved by the new web dev team during the upcoming Vercel site build to protect brand consistency and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)

## Topics

### Initial Performance Review (Phase 1)

  - [**Context:** Initial setup included core content artifacts, a 50k+ keyword competitive analysis, and analytics platform integration (Check That, Looker).](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=472.0)
  - [**Impressions & Clicks:**](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [9 articles → 100k+ impressions.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [Top performers: "Shareholder vs. Stakeholder," "SAFE vs. Convertible Note," "Angel Investor vs. Venture Capitalist."](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [**Insight:** High CTR is the ultimate goal, as it signals strong user intent. The "Angel Investor" article's high CTR with fewer impressions is a positive sign of resonance.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=983.0)
  - [**SEO & AI Visibility:**](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=620.0)
      - [**SEO:** The "Shareholder vs. Stakeholder" article ranks on Page 1 for 36 keywords and appears in AI Overviews.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
      - [**AI:** Content appears in Google AI Overviews alongside top competitors (A16z, Sequoia). Claude specifically cites CRV for its value prop ("excels with technical founders"), a key strategic win.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1391.0)

### Phase 2 Strategy & Operations

  - [**Goal:** Maintain strategy while increasing publishing velocity to \~20 articles/month.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1634.0)
  - [**Optimization:** By late March, data from \~20 articles will enable optimization based on cluster performance (impressions, clicks, engagement).](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)
  - [**New POC:** Erik O'Brien is the primary contact.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [**Communication:** Use the public Slack channel for all requests to ensure visibility for the full GrowthX team (Erik, William, Hassan).](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
      - [**Review Workflow:** Tag Erik in docs or the channel upon review completion to signal readiness.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [**Content Direction:**](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
      - [**Technical Focus:** Prioritize technical examples (e.g., Anthropic, OpenAI) and job titles (e.g., VP of Engineering) to better target the founder persona.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1922.0)
      - [**Imagery:** First-party photos are a "stretch goal" for brand authenticity, not an SEO priority. GrowthX will provide a wish list for the next photoshoot.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1756.0)

### Rebrand & Web Dev Migration

  - [**Problem:** Google and AI tools are citing the old "Charles River Ventures" name, not the current "CRV."](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=760.0)
  - [**Context:** A new site is being built on Vercel, a CRV-backed company. This requires a new web dev firm, as the current one (Underbelly) specializes in Webflow.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [**Action:** The new web dev firm must provide a technical solution for the old name issue during the migration to protect SEO and brand consistency.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Erik:**](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Provide CRV with direct access to the Check That analytics platform.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=570.0)
      - [Pin the Content OS and Check That links to the Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)
      - [Share benchmark data on clicks/impressions from other clients for context.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
      - [Send a screenshot of the Claude AI response citing CRV.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Create a "wish list" Google Doc for first-party photos.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [**CRV:**](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
      - [Share new brand/logo files in the Slack channel.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
      - [Ask final web dev candidates for their solution to the "Charles River Ventures" citation issue.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)
      - [Introduce the new web dev firm to GrowthX once selected.](https://fathom.video/share/KTiPY7nfWYsaGDq-73uUAs61SbzsSFRS?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
